content: Slightly reduces memory usage for physics constraints.
`Class.InputBindings` connected to UI buttons now change state to `FALSE` when a touch releases rather than when the touch exits the button bounds but is still pressed.
Renaming nodes in the Animation Graph Editor now also changes the name of the instance.
Adds support for yielding from Luau iterator functions.
A new API, `GetBundlesByAssetIDAsync(assetId: number, limit: number?)`, has been added to `Class.AvatarEditorService`. It allows you to search for bundles that contain the provided assetId.
Adds a "Open Logs Folder" action to the Studio Help menu to more easily access log files.
Fixes platform replication logic when a platform is unanchored.
Fixes a bug for Chromebooks and Android devices with mice that sometimes prevented mouse buttons from working in first-person mode.
Fixes an issue where `Enum.AnimationNodeType.MaskNode` didn't work for rigs with spaces in their label name, such as "Left Shoulder" for R6.

Changes the behavior of `Enum.AnimationNodeType.RandomSequenceNode` to where the RNG state persists across resets so subsequent plays of the node produce different orderings instead of the same ordering (current behavior).
`Class.UICorner` instances placed on 9-slice images now round the image corners instead of rounding each image slice individually.
Improves the performance of `Class.AudioEcho` when the `DelayTime` property is unchanging.
Fixes a rare crash on mobile devices when using the Acoustic Simulation feature.
Fixes bug in Developer Console where if ancestor parts were parented to nil, descendant instances were not tracked as unparented.
Fixes frame spikes when using high polling mice.
Introduces a new `Class.PlayerGui` property, `ClipsDescendantsSupportsRotation`, which enables clipping of rotated shapes and `Class.Path2D` instances.
Adjusts the gamepad selection point and click algorithm to use a point on the selection outline of the current element as an origin rather than the center of the current selection.
Fixes a bug where animations would not reset correctly in Avatar Setup.
